title: hpc-compose settings
description: Settings file for hpc-compose (.hpc-compose/settings.toml). Rust validation remains the semantic source of truth.

version.description: Settings schema version. Currently only version 1 is supported.

default_profile.description: Name of the profile to use when --profile is not given on the command line.

resource_profiles.description: Reusable Slurm resource defaults referenced from x-slurm.resources in compose files.

watchSettings.description: Watch/replay TUI display defaults. Environment variables and CLI flags still take precedence.

sort.description: Default service ordering in the watch view.

wrap.description: Wrap long log lines instead of truncating them.

mouse.description: Enable mouse capture for scroll-wheel log scrolling.

compose_file.description: Default compose file path for this profile.

env_files.description: Additional .env files to load, resolved relative to the settings base directory.

env.description: Static interpolation variables for this profile.

login_host.description: SSH login host used as the `up --remote` delegation destination and shown in connection hints. May be a bare host, a ~/.ssh/config alias, or user@host.

login_user.description: SSH username applied to a bare login host for `up --remote` (destination becomes user@host). Overridden by an explicit user@ and by HPC_COMPOSE_REMOTE_USER.

ssh.description: Path to the ssh client used by `up --remote` delegation and follow-ups.

rsync.description: Path to rsync used by `up --remote` to mirror the project to the login node.

dir.description: Shared cache directory visible from both the Slurm submission host and compute nodes.

enroot_temp_dir.description: Directory enroot uses for its temporary extraction scratch (ENROOT_TEMP_PATH) during prepare-time image import. Defaults to <cache_dir>/enroot/tmp; point it at fast node-local storage (e.g. /tmp/$USER-hpc-compose-enroot) when the shared cache filesystem causes `Stale file handle` errors. Overridden by the compose x-slurm.enroot_temp_dir and HPC_COMPOSE_ENROOT_TEMP_DIR.

workspaceSettings.description: hpc-workspace (ws_*) lifecycle settings for the `workspace` command group. A profile's workspace block overrides defaults.workspace per field.

name.description: Workspace name passed to the ws_* tools (for example hpc-compose-cache).

duration_days.description: Allocation/renewal duration in days for ws_allocate and the ws_extend default (default 30).

auto_allocate.description: Allocate a missing workspace automatically at submit time. Reserved: used from Phase 2 (up/preflight integration).

auto_extend.description: Extend the workspace automatically at submit time when it would expire too soon. Reserved: used from Phase 2.

warn_days_left.description: Warn when fewer than this many days of workspace lifetime remain (default 7; 0 disables the warning). Reserved: used from Phase 2.

queue_buffer_days.description: Extra buffer in days on top of a job's expected queue+run time for expiry checks (default 2; 0 disables the buffer). Reserved: used from Phase 2.
